name: Outright Games
short_description: Family-friendly game publisher specialising in licensed entertainment brands.
about: Outright Games is an independent publisher focused on family-friendly interactive entertainment. Based in Glasgow, the company works with major global entertainment brands to create games for younger audiences across all major platforms. Their portfolio includes titles based on popular franchises such as Paw Patrol, Peppa Pig, and DC Super Hero Girls, making them one of the leading publishers in the family gaming space.
